bugs.name: Format switch race condition
bugs.introduced_msg: core: audio engine (play, pause, seek, stop) + TrackInfo model
bugs.note: Race in SwitchFormat: _reader/_waveProvider swapped without lock. Partial fix adds null guard only — race remains when Play() runs concurrently.

bugs.name: Null reference on cover art
bugs.introduced_msg: metadata extraction but cover art still scares me
bugs.full_fix_msg: fix: BUG-002 — MetadataExtractor checks Pictures.Length > 0 before indexing cover art
bugs.note: WinForms MetadataExtractor.cs accessed file.Tag.Pictures[0] unconditionally. Core MetadataExtractor.cs guards with tag.Pictures != null && tag.Pictures.Length > 0.

bugs.name: WASAPI loopback resource leak
bugs.introduced_msg: audio: WASAPI loopback capture feeds FFT + waveform buffers
bugs.partial_fix_msg: audio: LoopbackCaptureSafe disposes enumerator in finally (noticed original didn't)
bugs.note: LoopbackCapture.Start() creates MMDeviceEnumerator and MMDevice but neither is disposed — device held as COM ref until GC. LoopbackCaptureSafe fixes enumerator with finally{} but still doesn't dispose device after passing to WasapiLoopbackCapture.

bugs.name: Spotify token refresh race
bugs.introduced_msg: streaming: spotify source — PKCE OAuth search + stream, BUG-004 injected (per-instance token cache not thread-safe)
bugs.partial_fix_msg: streaming: token fixer — static semaphore + 50s cache (SpotifySource._cachedToken still racy)
bugs.note: SpotifySource._cachedToken and _tokenExpiry are per-instance fields updated without a lock. Two concurrent callers both see expired token and both refresh. SpotifyTokenFixer adds a static semaphore with 50s cache but SpotifySource doesn't use it — race still exists on the instance.

bugs.name: WinForms event pattern in Core
bugs.introduced_msg: core: NaudioAudioEngine — WaveOutEvent, FormatReaderRegistry routing, AudioSampleTap integration
bugs.note: NaudioAudioEngine uses C# EventHandler delegates (TrackLoaded, PlaybackStarted, PlaybackPaused, PlaybackStopped) — standard WinForms/POCO event pattern. Core type consumed by ReactiveUI/Avalonia layer that prefers IObservable<T>. Not a crash bug, but the App layer works around it with lambda subscriptions rather than reactive chains.

bugs.name: SoundCloud metadata null check
bugs.introduced_msg: streaming: soundcloud source — search + stream via client_id API, BUG-010 injected (null user field NullRef)
bugs.note: SoundCloudSource.SearchAsync() accesses item['user']['username'] — item['user'] can be null for private/deleted tracks. JToken null is not C# null, so ?. doesn't help.

bugs.name: YouTube yt-dlp silent failure
bugs.introduced_msg: streaming: youtube source — yt-dlp subprocess for search+stream, BUG-011 injected (null return on failure)
bugs.note: YouTubeSource.OpenStreamAsync() returns null when yt-dlp output is empty/whitespace — caller has no way to distinguish 'no URL' from 'process failed silently'.

bugs.name: Queue index out of sync after shuffle
bugs.introduced_msg: queue: PlayQueue — add/remove/move, shuffle order, repeat modes, prev/next navigation
bugs.partial_fix_msg: fix: queue shuffle Next() used _currentIndex as shuffle position — add _shufflePos tracker
bugs.note: Next() in shuffle mode used _currentIndex (item index in _items[]) directly as position in _shuffleOrder[], causing skips when shuffle was toggled mid-queue or after PlayAt(). Partial fix adds _shufflePos to track shuffle position separately, but Move() still doesn't update _shuffleOrder indices after drag-reorder — so shuffled navigation after a move can still land on the wrong track.

notes: W1 complete: 48 commits, Feb 15 - Mar 31 2025. Audio engine, 8 format readers, device enum, UI components, metadata extraction.
BUG-001 INJECTED at 5a617e7 (AudioEngine.SwitchFormat — no lock around _reader/_waveProvider swap). PARTIAL FIX at 39e80d9 (null guard only, race remains).
BUG-002 INJECTED at 9dec10b (MetadataExtractor.Extract — file.Tag.Pictures[0] no bounds check). Still live.

W2 complete: 32 commits, Apr 1-20 2025. SQLite library with FTS5 search, folder watcher with debounce, album grid view, genre filter panel, Ctrl+L toggle, drag-drop to playlist, batch upsert, FTS5 maintenance, M3U export. No new bugs.
W3 complete: 38 commits, Apr 21-May 10 2025. 14 GDI+ visualizers, WASAPI loopback, FFT+waveform buffers, smoother, pipeline coordinator. BUG-003 INJECTED at d58988e; PARTIAL FIX at d8f7236.

W3.5 complete: 32 commits, May 11-25 2025. IStreamingSource/StreamingRegistry, Spotify PKCE, SoundCloud, Suno, YouTube yt-dlp, streaming UI. BUG-004 INJECTED+PARTIAL FIX. BUG-010 INJECTED. BUG-011 INJECTED.
W4 complete: 24 commits, May 26-Jun 10 2025. PlayQueue, shuffle, repeat, QueuePanel, transport, tray, media keys, hotkeys. BUG-012 INJECTED+PARTIAL FIX.
W4 end: merged dev -> staging -> main, tagged v1.0.0 (Jun 10, 2025).
A0 complete: 20 commits, Jun 11-30 2025. Core (.NET 8) + App (Avalonia 11.1) + Tests (xUnit). Core interfaces, models, infrastructure, App shell. BUG-002 FIXED at 08eecf6.

A1 complete: 44 commits, Jul 1-Aug 31 2025. Core audio pipeline (FftProcessor, WaveformBuffer, AudioPipeline, NaudioAudioEngine), library (LibraryDb/Repo/Scanner/Watcher/CoverArtStore), queue (QueuePersistence), streaming (YouTubeSource, SoundCloudSource, SpotifySource, StreamingRegistry). App: ViewModels (Main/Player/Library/Queue), views (MainWindow, NowPlaying, Library, Queue), controls (SpectrumBars, WaveformView), services (Position, CoverArt, Hotkey, Tray, PipelineWiring), converters, Tokens.axaml. BUG-009 INJECTED at f39e3b2.

A2 complete: 28 commits, Sep 1-Oct 15 2025. Playlist system (static+smart, SmartPlaylistEvaluator, PlaylistRepository, PlaylistManager), PlaylistViewModel, TagEditorService (TagLib r/w+.bak backup), TagEditorViewModel+Dialog, LibraryImportExport (M3U+PLS), AppSettings+SettingsRepository, SettingsViewModel+Dialog, EqualizerEffect (BiQuad 10-band), IScrobbler+LastFmScrobbler (MD5 sig), ScrobbleService, ReplayGainReader (Xiph+ID3v2), DuplicateDetector, LibraryScanProgress, AlbumArtResolver, BrowseViewModel, FileDialogService, ScanProgressViewModel. ServiceContainer expanded.
At A10 end: merge dev -> staging -> main, tag v5.0.0.
